name_en: Premium Original Leather M25087 White Small Capucines Series. The Capucines BB handbag was born in 2013, named after the Paris street where Louis Vuitton opened its first store in 1854. This Capucines BB handbag features full-grain Taurillon leather, blending multiple brand elements: leather-wrapped LV letters, a handle inspired by classic trunks, and a distinctive flap featuring Monogram flowers. With the shoulder strap, you can switch between hand and shoulder carry. Dimensions: 27 × 17.3 × 9 cm
